text: You feel an overwhelming presence, stirring in its sleep.
Its song is painting the world in vibrant colors.
You hear faint music somewhere on your body.
You hear the structure buckle under the wind.
You hear faint music you never heard before.
You see a news broadcast, you can't understand what any of it means.
You hear someone observing you from the abyss below.
You hear a faint radio transmission.
You briefly see a thunder strike, it's muffled and it's not there.
You can briefly smell old books.
You feel the warmth of a lit up fireplace.
